issues.sample: Driving on a road trip from Norfolk to Louisville from military duty and the car lost power suddenly on the highway at night. Very scary. Had been averaging about 72 mph. Absolutely no reason for it. 36 degrees outside in the middle of rural KY. Awful experience. Likely gonna nee

narrative.headline: What 2023 Lucid Air owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 24 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (29% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
